[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010011001 4
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000100010 2

01 10 000100011 3
12 21 000010111 4
23 32 011010011 5

56 65 000000110 2
67 76 000000000 a match 1 2 3 4 5 6
70 07 000000001 1

57 75 010001000 2
